policy.assignmentRule: Assign every supported tag and no unsupported tag. A tag must be supported by structured source data or explicit scholarship text.
policy.negativeEvidenceRule: Do not assign a tag from silence, provider identity, or broad promotional language.
policy.fieldTagsRule: Assign both a broad field tag and any supported specific field tag.
policy.populationTagsRule: Assign only populations explicitly eligible, preferred, or directly supported by the award.
policy.institutionRule: Institution-specific requires eligibility limited to a named institution or institution system.
policy.noEssayRule: No-essay requires explicit current-source evidence that no essay is required.

tags.label: Financial Need
tags.definition: Financial need, low income, or economic hardship is required, considered, or explicitly preferred.

tags.label: Merit-Based
tags.definition: Academic achievement, talent, service, leadership, or another merit criterion affects selection.

tags.label: No Essay
tags.definition: The current application explicitly states that no essay is required.

tags.label: First-Generation Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly prefers first-generation college students.

tags.label: Women and Girls
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports women or girls.

tags.label: Black Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports Black or African American students.

tags.label: Hispanic or Latino Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports Hispanic or Latino students.

tags.label: Indigenous Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports Indigenous, Native American, Alaska Native, Native Hawaiian, First Nations, or tribal students.

tags.label: Asian or Pacific Islander Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports Asian, Asian American, Native Hawaiian, or Pacific Islander students.

tags.label: Middle Eastern or North African Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports Middle Eastern or North African students.

tags.label: Underrepresented Students
tags.definition: Explicitly targets broadly underrepresented, underserved, minority, or historically excluded students without naming a more specific population.

tags.label: LGBTQ+ Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports LGBTQ+ students.

tags.label: International Students
tags.definition: International or non-US students are explicitly eligible.

tags.label: Immigrant or Refugee Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports immigrants, refugees, asylees, or their children.

tags.label: DACA or Undocumented Students
tags.definition: DACA recipients or undocumented students are explicitly eligible or supported.

tags.label: Veterans and Service Members
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports veterans, active-duty service members, reservists, or National Guard members.

tags.label: Military Families
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports spouses, dependents, or children of military members or veterans.

tags.label: Rural Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly prefers students from rural areas.

tags.label: Adult and Returning Learners
tags.definition: Explicitly supports adult, returning, nontraditional, or career-changing students.

tags.label: Students with Disabilities
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports students with physical, sensory, intellectual, developmental, or learning disabilities.

tags.label: Chronic Illness or Medical Condition
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports students living with a named chronic illness, disease, syndrome, or serious medical condition.

tags.label: Cancer-Affected Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports cancer patients, survivors, or immediate family members affected by cancer.

tags.label: Foster Care Experience
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports current or former foster youth.

tags.label: Homeless or Housing-Insecure Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports students experiencing homelessness or housing insecurity.

tags.label: Single Parents
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports students who are single parents.

tags.label: Bereaved Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports students who have lost a parent, guardian, sibling, or spouse.

tags.label: Overcoming Adversity
tags.definition: Overcoming substantial personal hardship, barriers, or adversity is required or considered.

tags.label: Community Service
tags.definition: Community service or volunteer involvement is required or considered.

tags.label: Leadership
tags.definition: Leadership experience, achievement, or potential is required or considered.

tags.label: Student Athletes
tags.definition: Participation in athletics or a named sport is required or considered.

tags.label: Extracurricular Involvement
tags.definition: Extracurricular or school activity involvement is required or considered.

tags.label: Arts and Creative Fields
tags.definition: For visual arts, performing arts, music, design, writing, film, or related creative study or talent.

tags.label: STEM
tags.definition: For science, technology, engineering, mathematics, or closely related study.

tags.label: Engineering
tags.definition: Specifically for engineering study or engineering careers.

tags.label: Computer Science and IT
tags.definition: For computer science, software, information technology, data science, or related computing fields.

tags.label: Cybersecurity
tags.definition: Specifically for cybersecurity, information assurance, or information security.

tags.label: Mathematics and Statistics
tags.definition: For mathematics, statistics, actuarial science, or related quantitative study.

tags.label: Natural Sciences
tags.definition: For biology, chemistry, physics, astronomy, earth science, or related natural sciences.

tags.label: Healthcare and Health Sciences
tags.definition: For medicine, allied health, public health, clinical care, or healthcare careers.

tags.label: Nursing
tags.definition: Specifically for nursing students or nurses.

tags.label: Medicine
tags.definition: Specifically for medical school, physicians, or pre-medicine.

tags.label: Dentistry
tags.definition: For dentistry, dental hygiene, dental assisting, or related oral health fields.

tags.label: Pharmacy
tags.definition: For pharmacy students, pharmacists, or pharmaceutical study.

tags.label: Public Health
tags.definition: Specifically for public health, epidemiology, health policy, or community health.

tags.label: Veterinary Fields
tags.definition: For veterinary medicine, veterinary technology, or animal health.

tags.label: Education and Teaching
tags.definition: For education, teaching, school counseling, or educator careers.

tags.label: Business
tags.definition: For business administration, management, marketing, human resources, or entrepreneurship.

tags.label: Accounting and Finance
tags.definition: For accounting, finance, banking, economics, or actuarial business careers.

tags.label: Law and Legal Studies
tags.definition: For law school, pre-law, paralegal, legal studies, or legal careers.

tags.label: Public and Civic Service
tags.definition: For government, public administration, nonprofit, civic service, or public policy careers.

tags.label: Social Work and Human Services
tags.definition: For social work, human services, counseling, or related helping professions.

tags.label: Psychology and Behavioral Science
tags.definition: For psychology, behavioral science, mental health counseling, or related study.

tags.label: Communications and Journalism
tags.definition: For communications, journalism, media, public relations, or broadcasting.

tags.label: Skilled Trades and Vocational Fields
tags.definition: For skilled trades, technical certificates, construction trades, manufacturing, or vocational programs.

tags.label: Architecture and Construction
tags.definition: For architecture, construction management, building science, or related design and construction careers.

tags.label: Agriculture and Food Systems
tags.definition: For agriculture, agribusiness, food systems, horticulture, forestry, or related study.

tags.label: Environment and Conservation
tags.definition: For environmental science, sustainability, conservation, fisheries, wildlife, or related work.

tags.label: Aviation and Aerospace
tags.definition: For aviation, aerospace, pilots, air traffic, or related careers.

tags.label: Hospitality and Tourism
tags.definition: For hospitality, tourism, culinary management, or related service industries.

tags.label: Membership Required
tags.definition: Applicant or family membership in a named organization, association, union, club, or tribe is required.

tags.label: Employees and Their Families
tags.definition: Restricted to employees, former employees, or their children, spouses, or dependents.

tags.label: Religious Affiliation
tags.definition: Membership, participation, ministry, or affiliation with a named faith community is required or preferred.

tags.label: Study Abroad
tags.definition: Funds or requires study abroad, international academic travel, or an overseas educational program.

tags.label: Institution-Specific
tags.definition: Only students at a named institution or institution system are eligible.

tags.label: Community College
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports community college or two-year college students.

tags.label: Transfer Students
tags.definition: Restricted to or explicitly supports students transferring between institutions.
